page.title: Agents
page.subtitle: Manage and chat with your AI agents

card.chat_no_conn: Set up a connection for this agent

empty:
No agents yet.
Create the first one with + New agent.

modal.memory_hint: Use the agent's default file or choose another
modal.placeholder_prompt: Describe the agent's role. E.g.: 'You are a B2B sales expert. Always respond in English. Be direct and use concrete examples.'
modal.field_temp_hint: Controls response creativity. Low values (0.1–0.4) give more precise and predictable answers; high values (0.7–1.0) give more varied and creative responses.
modal.agent_type_hint: Determines which options are available and how the agent is exported to each platform.
modal.export_warning: When exporting an agent to a different platform than its type, the specific configuration (thinking, response format, etc.) will not be included in the exported file.
modal.claude_extended_thinking_hint: The model reasons internally before responding. Improves quality on complex analysis, math, or code tasks, at the cost of higher latency and cost.
modal.claude_prompt_cache_hint: Caches the system prompt between calls. Reduces cost by up to 90% and latency when the prompt is long and doesn't change between turns.
modal.claude_thinking_budget_hint: Maximum number of tokens the model can use to reason internally before generating the visible response. More tokens = deeper reasoning, but slower and more expensive.
modal.openai_response_format_hint: Format the model should use when responding. 'Free text' is the normal response. 'JSON' forces the model to always return a valid JSON object, useful for automated integrations.
modal.openai_tool_choice_hint: Controls whether the model can use tools (functions). 'Auto' decides on its own, 'None' disables them, 'Required' forces their use.
modal.openai_freq_penalty_hint: Penalizes repeating the same words or phrases. Positive values reduce lexical repetition; useful for long responses or summaries. Range: -2 to 2.
modal.openai_pres_penalty_hint: Penalizes introducing already-mentioned topics. Positive values encourage the model to explore new topics instead of dwelling on ones already covered. Range: -2 to 2.
modal.github_topic_hint: Category label that helps Copilot understand the agent's domain. E.g.: 'testing', 'devops', 'security'. Does not affect behavior, only organization.
modal.github_repo_context_hint: Includes a section in the exported file that tells Copilot to take the current repository's code into account when responding.
modal.routine_schedule_hint: Cron format: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week

export.title: Export agent
export.zip_hint_claude: Downloaded. Extract the ZIP in your project root.
export.zip_hint_github: Downloaded. Extract the ZIP in your repository root.
